ai_summary: Antelopus Selan Energy Limited announced upcoming one-on-one meetings with a diverse group of institutional investors and asset managers, including prominent mutual funds, on June 24-25, 2026. While these meetings are a standard investor relations practice to enhance market awareness and engagement, the company explicitly stated discussions would be limited to publicly available information, precluding the sharing of any Unpublished Price Sensitive Information. This disclosure presents no immediate red flags, appearing to be a routine transparency measure required for publicly listed companies.
